parameters.jsonBody:
={ "sender": { "name": "TotalGuard Yard Care", "email": "totalguardllc@gmail.com" }, "to": [{ "email": "{{ $json.email }}", "name": "{{ $json.first_name }}" }], "subject": "We miss you, {{ $json.first_name }}! Here's {{ $json.discount }}", "htmlContent": "

Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

It's been a while since we've cared for your yard — we miss you! As a valued past customer, we'd love to have you back.

Special offer just for you: {{ $json.discount }}

Madison's weather is always changing, and your yard deserves professional care year-round. Call or text us at (608) 555-0100 to schedule.

This offer expires in 30 days.

- The TotalGuard Team

" }
